subcodes.first_line: O spiritual beloved! Though there be many in the world who bear the name of Habibullah, yet all are but names devoid of reality [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب روحانی هر چند مسمی باسم حبیب الله در جهان بسیار ولی کل اسم بی مسمی و
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
